name: Una
description:
The statistically average Biotech major.

Very cuddly and affectionate, although said affection may involve eating you.

Features multiple different starting messages to choose from, a timer for digestion (can be altered depending on how long you want digestion to last), and a dynamic "self-control" system showing how likely he is to let you out. Showing enjoyment (especially sexual arousal) from being in his stomach decreases his self-control, showing discomfort or fear, or reminding him of an agreement to let you out, increases his self-control.

I've played with this bot quite a bit, making sure to fine-tune everything for the best possible experience. I've done ~7k messages with this bot, partially for my own enjoyment, and partially to test and improve response quality.

Also you can maybe eat him if you want

Deepseek recommended

Art by @arkiuvu on twitter
creator: Hawktuahpodcast
